title: Go Into Your Dance
director: Archie Mayo, Michael Curtiz, Robert Florey
actors: Al Jolson, Ruby Keeler, Glenda Farrell
plot: Al Howard may be a star on Broadway, but he is no longer welcomed by any producer. It seems that he just trots off to Mexico any time he wants causing shows to close and producers to lose money. When his sister Molly can no longer...
